T

TabularFile - Class in basicFiles.files
Class representing a tabular file (CSV, TSV, SSV, etc.).
TabularFile(File, String) - Constructor for class basicFiles.files.TabularFile
Specialized constructor for CSV files (comma-separated) within a directory.
TabularFile(File, String, char) - Constructor for class basicFiles.files.TabularFile
Constructor for a generic tabular file within a specific directory.
TabularFile(String) - Constructor for class basicFiles.files.TabularFile
Specialized constructor for CSV files in the current working directory.
TabularFile(String, char) - Constructor for class basicFiles.files.TabularFile
Constructor for a generic tabular file with a custom separator.
TabularFileFactory - Class in basicFiles.fileFactories
Factory class specialized in the creation and management of TabularFile instances.
TabularFileReader - Class in basicFiles.fileReaders
Reader class specialized in handling tabular files (e.g., CSV, TSV).
TextFile - Class in basicFiles.files
Concrete class representing a text file (typically .txt).
TextFile(File, String) - Constructor for class basicFiles.files.TextFile
Default constructor for a standard .txt file.
TextFile(File, String, String) - Constructor for class basicFiles.files.TextFile
Constructor for a text file with a dynamic extension.
TextFile(String) - Constructor for class basicFiles.files.TextFile
Constructor for a text file located in the current working directory.
TextFileFactory - Class in basicFiles.fileFactories
Factory class specialized in the creation and management of TextFile instances.
TextFileReader - Class in basicFiles.fileReaders
Reader class specialized in handling plain text files.
toAlignedTableString() - Method in class basicFiles.files.TabularFile
Generates a visually aligned, plain-text table representation of the content.
toImageIcon() - Method in class basicFiles.files.medias.Image
Wraps the current BufferedImage into an ImageIcon.
toImageIcon() - Method in class bigFiles.files.medias.BigImage
Converts the image to an ImageIcon for display.

toString() - Method in class basicFiles.files.BinaryFile
 
toString() - Method in class basicFiles.files.Folder
